title: ValueSERP Search Request
description: Query parameters for the ValueSERP /search endpoint supporting organic, shopping, news, images, places, and product searches.

q.description: The keyword or search query to use.

search_type.description: Specifies the type of search. Omit for organic search.

location.description: Geographic location. Accepts location names or GPS coordinates.

location_auto.description: Auto-update gl/hl based on built-in location. Defaults to true.

google_domain.description: Google domain to use for the search.

gl.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the Google country to use.

hl.description: BCP-47 language code for Google UI language.

lr.description: Limit results to specified language (e.g., lang_en).

cr.description: Limit results to specified country (e.g., countryUS).

max_page.description: Retrieve multiple result pages in a single request.

tbs.description: Custom Google TBS parameter for advanced filtering.

uule.description: Custom Google UULE location parameter override.

time_period_min.description: Custom period start date (MM/DD/YYYY). Required when time_period=custom.

time_period_max.description: Custom period end date (MM/DD/YYYY). Required when time_period=custom.

knowledge_graph_id.description: Specific Google Knowledge Graph entity ID.

include_ai_overview.description: Include Google AI overview in response (+1 credit if returned).

include_ai_overview_paa.description: Include AI overview answers in People Also Ask results.

include_answer_box.description: Include featured snippet as first organic result.

flatten_results.description: Flatten inline videos and images into results.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of top-level response objects to return.

order_online.description: Return pickup/delivery info for restaurants (US only, 2 credits).

ads_optimized.description: Optimize ad return rates (costs 3 additional credits).

sort_by.description: Sort order for shopping or news results.

shopping_buy_on_google.description: Filter to Buy on Google products (shopping only).

show_duplicates.description: Show duplicate news results when sort_by=date (news only).

exclude_if_modified.description: Exclude results from queries modified by Google (news only).

images_page.description: Image results page (100 images per page, images only).

images_usage.description: Filter images by usage rights (images only).

product_free_shipping.description: Filter to free-shipping products (product search only).

product_condition_new.description: Filter to new products (product search only).

product_condition_used.description: Filter to used products (product search only).
